description: Almost poetic letter of a Gaon, perhaps Shelomo b. Yehuda. A woman deserted by her husband for many years had brought up her only son and when he was old enough had sent him out to find his father, but the boy perished on his way. Along with attempts at consolation the Gaon refers to a debt of 300 dinars and losses incurred by the recipient of his letter. On microfilm the verso appears before the recto. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 199)
description_he: מכתב כמעט שירי מגאון, אולי שלמה ב' יהודה. אשה שנעזבה על ידי בעלה שנים רבות גידלה את בנה היחיד ושלחה אותו לחפש את אביו, אך הנער מת בדרך. הגאון מנסה לנחם ומזכיר חוב של 300 דינרים.
